claims.summary: The 48D codec should preserve narrative trajectory and projected semantic distinctions rather than only aggregate intensity.
claims.disposition: verify current narrative direction, curvature, velocity, acceleration, process-versus-settled, and heavy-imagery-versus-manual tests

claims.summary: Deterministic encoding can collide for distinct intents and requires bounded collision evidence.
claims.disposition: verify the existing bounded 1024-case seed/fingerprint collision probe and distinct narrative fixtures without claiming global collision resistance

claims.summary: Distinct high-intensity emotional trajectories should produce different narrative-arc evidence.
claims.disposition: verify current narrative-arc tests distinguish direction, lost-versus-finding, solidifying-versus-draping, looping, and opposed oscillation

claims.summary: A lambda-tail stimulus intended to produce a perceptible room shift would send live semantic content.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with bounded stimulus, rescue checks, canary, abort, and post-change felt review

claims.summary: Narrative dynamic tension should capture rate and direction of change between text regions.
claims.disposition: verify later source already exposes half-to-half arc, four-point curvature, velocity, acceleration, and persistence as read-only evidence

claims.summary: A context-aware feature ceiling should account for density without turning high entropy into unbounded loudness.
claims.disposition: verify current gradient-aware vibrancy and aperture evidence is bounded, tail-scoped, and keeps live gain readiness off by default

claims.summary: Directly mapping shadow magnetization into codec friction would change live feature projection.
claims.disposition: verify current fallback language can name magnetization diagnostically, but require Mike/operator Tier 5 approval before any codec-vector coupling

claims.summary: The felt velvet grain may correlate with rhythm and density but is not established as caused by semantic trickle.
claims.disposition: preserve the felt relation while keeping rhythm, density, trickle, and codec delivery as separate non-causal evidence
